name: Digital Brands Group, Inc.
summary: Company Overview We are a curated collection of lifestyle brands, including Bailey, DSTLD, Stateside, Sundry and Avo, that offers a variety of apparel products through direct-to-consumer and wholesale distribution. Our complementary brand portfolio provides us with the unique opportunity to cross merchandise our brands.
